title: docker-compose up not working on macos for simple docker compose file
body:
/kind bug

**Description**
I'm trying to `docker-compose up` what I feel like to be a [pretty simple docker compose file](https://github.com/quarkus-for-spring-developers/examples/blob/main/chapter-5/chapter-5-quarkus-kafka-streams/docker-compose.yaml) (`docker-compose up` works just fine with the Docker Desktop daemon running). This file stands up a Kafka broker with an associated Zookeeper instance.

I installed podman via Homebrew and did `podman machine init` and `podman machine start`.

When I `docker-compose up` I get:
```shell
Cannot connect to the Docker daemon at unix:///var/run/docker.sock. Is the docker daemon running?
```

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**
I would expect that this would "just work" for a macos user.

**Output of `podman version`:**
```shell
Client:
Version:      3.3.1
API Version:  3.3.1
Go Version:   go1.17
Built:        Mon Aug 30 15:15:26 2021
OS/Arch:      darwin/amd64

Server:
Version:      3.3.0
API Version:  3.3.0
Go Version:   go1.16.6
Built:        Fri Aug 20 15:36:14 2021
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```

comments.body: Is that really a duplicate of this? Maybe #11389 is more appropriate?
